The following events took place in '''3994 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Events==
*[[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma]] made a pilgrimage to the [[Qel-Droma's Grave|grave site]] of [[Gender/Legends|his]] [[Cay Qel-Droma|brother]] on [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]].<ref name="TSW6">[[Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War 6|''Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War'' 6]]</ref>
*Ulic Qel-Droma revisited [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]].<ref name="TSW6" />

==Births==
*[[Carth Onasi]] on [[Telos IV]]<ref name="DB">{{DB|character|carthonasi|Onasi, Carth}}</ref>
*[[Murtog]] {{Circa}}<ref name="Revan">''[[The Old Republic: Revan]]''</ref>
*[[Revan/Legends|Revan]] {{Circa}}<ref name="Revan" />
